meaning: n.[律](离婚诉讼中被指控通奸的)共同被告
examples: The corespondent boundary and initial conditions are also proposed.
I'm sure we have a correspondent relationship with your bank as we maintain a corespondent relationship with most of the large Banks in New York.
The 39-year-old war corespondent had filed copy on the discovery of a potentially dangerous chemicals factory just hours before her death.
